__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Aeneid,Mysterious Relic,Celestial Throne
|rank=orange
|amount=3
|category=self
|description=Per 900 Species War Tech Pts, Snail ATK +8; Species Wars Tech Pts: 45,000/45,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Species War Tech Points]]
